_annotation_guide: Labels: POSITIVE (praise/support/joy), NEGATIVE (criticism/complaint/sadness), NEUTRAL (factual/question/observation), MIXED (explicit positive AND negative in same text), SPAM (self-promotion/links/solicitation), TOXIC (slurs/threats/dehumanization). When ambiguous, prefer the dominant emotional signal. Sarcasm follows intended meaning, not literal words.
